description: Query iCloud data stored locally on macOS — Photos library storage analysis, with Contacts and more coming. All reads hit local SQLite databases directly; no network calls or iCloud API token required.

novel_features.name: Heaviest file finder
novel_features.description: Ranks every file in your Photos library by original size — instant answer to 'what should I delete?'

novel_features.name: Storage breakdown
novel_features.description: Library footprint by media type and year in a single query — no Photos.app required.

novel_features.name: Direct SQLite access
novel_features.description: Reads Photos.sqlite in read-only mode. No AppleScript, no Photos.app launch, no iCloud API token.
